chetichand2026.message:
🚩 Om Satnam Sakhi | Jai Jhulelal 🚩

🛕 Shri Amrapur Asthan, Jaipur 🛕

**March 20, 2026 (Friday) - Cheti Chand / Hindu New Year / New Samvatsar 2083**

Hindu Chaitra Shukla Pratipada Vikram Samvat 2083 (March 20, 2026), Friday, marks the beginning of the Hindu New Year and Cheti Chand! On this auspicious day, be sure to observe these traditions:

🦺 Wear yellow or saffron-colored clothes

Apply a tilak 🔶 on your forehead

Prepare sweets and sweet rice at home

🚩 Hoist a saffron flag (Dhwaj) on your rooftop 🚩

At night, light 5-7 🪔🪔🪔🪔🪔 diyas at home and outside

Decorate your doorway with flower garlands and create rangoli

🍃🌷🌻🌹🌸🌾 Adorn your entrance with flower and leaf torans !!!

Wishing all Sanatanis a very Happy Indian Hindu New Year and Cheti Chand 🌙. Heartfelt congratulations and best wishes to all!

🙋‍♂️🔆🚩 Let us all greet and congratulate each other on Hindu New Year, New Samvatsar 2083, and Cheti Chand! 🙋‍♂️🔆🚩

🏡 Shri Amrapur Asthan, Jaipur

mataKrishnaDeviUdhyan.message:
🕉️ ॐ Satnam Sakshi 🕉️

Under the divine guidance of Shri Prem Prakash Mandalacharya
Satguru Swami Teoonram Ji Maharaj

**Grand Inauguration of Newly Constructed Mata Krishna Udhyan**

📅 **Monday, April 14, 2025, at 5:00 PM**

In the sacred memory of the revered and compassionate Mata Krishna Ji, a grand and beautiful Mata Krishna Udhyan has been constructed on the holy banks of Maa Ganga by Prem Prakash Mandal in the Bhupatwala region of Haridwar.

The inauguration will take place on Monday, April 14, 2025, at 5:00 PM

The event will be graced by the auspicious presence of Honorable **Shri Om Birla Ji, Speaker of the Lok Sabha, Government of India**, who will perform the inauguration ceremony, under the esteemed leadership of **Prem Prakash Mandalacharya Satguru Swami Bhagat Prakash Ji Maharaj**.

In Service:
🔹 **Shri Prem Prakash Mandal Trust**
📍 Shri Amarapur Asthan, Jaipur
📞 Phone: 0141-2372423, 24

Address:
🔹 **Shri Prem Prakash Ashram**
📍 Bhupatwala, Haridwar - 249710
📱 Mobile: 7597731277

chalisaMahotsav.message:
🕉️ Om Satnam Sakshi 🕉️

**Satguru Teoonram Chalisa Festival**

**From 21st May (Wednesday) to 30th June (Monday), 2025**

Please observe the following important guidelines during the Satguru Teoonram Chalisa Vrat:

All devotees intending to begin the "Chalisa Saheb" must attend the **Pooja at 6:00 AM on 21st May (Wednesday)**.

1 . All devotees must perform the **"Satguru Teoonram Chalisa" recitation and 40 minutes of Naam Jap** daily at the 'Shri Guru Darbar' or at home for forty days.

2 . An **idol of Satguru Teoonram Baba** should be respectfully placed at home, and **Chalisa recitation and Aarti must be performed twice daily**.

3 . For forty days, devotees must chant the **"Satnam Sakshi Mahamantra" 108 times**, completing 9 maalas both in the morning and evening.

4 . On **"Saturdays and Satguru Teoonram Chauth"**, observe a **fast**, eating only once a day, and offer **"Dhodha and Chutney"** as Bhog at Shri Guru Darbar.

*If possible, devotees may also keep a full 40-day fast by eating once daily.*

5 . During these forty days, abstain from **meat, fish, eggs, alcohol, gambling**, and other such vices.

6 . On **30th June 2025 (Satguru Teoonram Jayanti)**, all devotees must light an **Akhand Jyot** at home.

On **30th June 2025 (Satguru Teoonram Avtaran Diwas)**, devotees must visit Shri Guru Darbar (Ashram), **offer prasad**, and eat **Tulsi leaves** to mark the conclusion of the Chalisa Vrat.

Shri Amarapur Asthan, Jaipur
